items.title: CET Computer Networks and Systems — Level 5

about.title: SOFTWARE ENGINEERING, FRONTEND AND INTEGRATIONS FOR REAL PROBLEMS.
about.description: I am Tânia Oliveira, a final-year Software Engineering student and junior developer with practical experience in web projects, responsive interfaces, API integration, Sage 50c, e-commerce, backoffice and internal applications.
introParagraphs: I am an early-career developer with practical experience in business environments. I mainly work with web development, responsive interfaces, API integration, data organization and solutions connected to business systems.

In recent projects, I have worked with React, Vite, JavaScript, TypeScript, C#/.NET, Sage 50c, WooCommerce, MongoDB, Render and Vercel. I like turning unclear requirements into clear interfaces, functional flows and solutions that help teams in their daily work.

principles.title: Engineering
principles.text: Foundation in Software Engineering, networks, programming, databases, APIs and secure development.

principles.title: Web
principles.text: Responsive interface development with React, Vite, JavaScript, HTML, CSS and integration with external services.

principles.title: Integration
principles.text: Practical experience with APIs, Sage 50c, WooCommerce, CRM, data synchronization and business workflows.

items.title: Sage 50c + integrations
items.text: I work on integration flows between Sage 50c, CRM, WooCommerce and web applications, focused on synchronizing customers, products, stock, documents and commercial data.

items.title: Web applications
items.text: Development of pages and applications with React/Vite, reusable components, responsive layouts and deployment on environments such as Vercel and Render.

items.title: Backoffice and operations
items.text: Participation in internal platforms with backoffice, operational PWA, authentication, APIs, task management, data and preparation for production.

items.title: Technical communication
items.text: Creation of documentation, error analysis, build validation, testing, tickets and technical explanations for clients and teams.

workflow.title: HOW I WORK
items: I first understand the business problem before thinking about the interface.
I aim to build responsive, clear layouts without unnecessary complexity.
I validate integrations with APIs, real data and complete flows.
I document decisions, errors and technical steps to make maintenance easier.

growth.title: CONTINUOUS EVOLUTION
growth.text: I am consolidating my experience in Software Engineering, focused on modern frontend, web application architecture, APIs, backend and business system integration. My goal is to grow as a developer capable of creating complete, usable and well-structured solutions.

coverLetter.title: A technical introduction for software teams and projects.
coverLetter.description: Base text aligned with practical experience in web development, integrations, data and business systems.
paragraphs: I am Tânia Oliveira, a final-year Software Engineering student with experience in frontend development, backend development, web applications, SaaS platforms, APIs and enterprise integrations.
I have worked on corporate websites, operational platforms, ERP/CRM connectors, marketplace synchronization and CRM data preparation workflows, always respecting business context confidentiality.
My approach is technical, organized and production-oriented: structured code, data validation, logs, GitHub/Bitbucket collaboration and attention to future maintenance.
